prompt: If I've been squatting 2-3 times per week, can I still progress on just 1 squat day per week, and how should I set it up?
assertions: Confirms progression on once-weekly squatting is absolutely possible
Notes the main tradeoff is usually slower rate of progress, not zero progress
Warns against collapsing all prior weekly volume into one massive session
Suggests avoiding a drop of more than about 50% in total weekly squat volume
Provides a practical starting heuristic (previous per-session dose plus ~1-2 sets, then adjust)
